name: jira.issue.update
description: Update fields on an existing Jira Cloud issue. Only the fields you supply are sent — other fields are left untouched.

configRefs.name: jira
configRefs.description: Generic config containing host (https://acme.atlassian.net), email, apiToken.

description.description: Plain text gets wrapped into ADF; pass an ADF object to forward as-is.

assignee.description: Assignee accountId. Pass empty string to unassign.

issue.description: Always null — Jira's PUT /issue endpoint returns 204 No Content. Re-fetch with jira.issue.get if you need the updated body.
